# drmaas.me

> Dan Maas's personal blog about software engineering, architecture, distributed systems, and career insights. Built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and daisyUI.

The site covers topics including microservices architecture, performance testing, search systems (hybrid RAG), cloud infrastructure (AWS), Bitcoin/Lightning Network, development tooling, and career reflections. All articles reflect hands-on engineering experience.

## About

- [About Me](https://drmaas.me/about/): Background and social links for Dan Maas
- [Explore](https://drmaas.me/explore/): Client-side search across all articles

## Articles

- [Starting a Blog](https://drmaas.me/articles/hello/): Goodbye procrastination.
- [Two Years at Salesforce — Core Insights from Enterprise Software Engineering](https://drmaas.me/articles/2-years-in-sf/): Lessons from scaling engineering impact in a large organization.
- [Running Bitcoin and Lightning Network on a Raspberry Pi](https://drmaas.me/articles/btcd-lnc-raspberri-pi/): A hands-on exploration of distributed financial infrastructure.
- [The Case of the Broken Lambda](https://drmaas.me/articles/broken-lambda/): API Gateway Lambda Proxy debugging.
- [Building the AWS Cloud Resume](https://drmaas.me/articles/cloud-resume/): End-to-end AWS architecture combining frontend, backend, and infrastructure.
- [Code Freeze 2025](https://drmaas.me/articles/codefreeze-2025/): Thawing my knowledge of software architecture.
- [My Favorite Development Tools](https://drmaas.me/articles/dev-tooling-1/): CLI FTW.
- [From GitHub Copilot to OpenCode + OpenRouter](https://drmaas.me/articles/from-github-copilot-to-opencode-plus-openrouter/): How switching saved time and money after Copilot's credit-based billing changes.
- [Migrating from Gatsby to Astro](https://drmaas.me/articles/gatsby-to-astro/): Choosing simplicity over abstraction in a static site framework.
- [Building Services Part 1 — Introduction to Domain Modeling](https://drmaas.me/articles/how-to-build-microservices-1/): Laying the foundation for effective service architecture.
- [Building Services Part 2 — Coding Practices and Project Structure](https://drmaas.me/articles/how-to-build-microservices-2/): Establishing patterns that scale across teams.
- [Building Services Part 3 — Comprehensive Testing Strategy](https://drmaas.me/articles/how-to-build-microservices-3/): Building confidence through systematic verification.
- [Building Services Part 4 — Infrastructure](https://drmaas.me/articles/how-to-build-microservices-4/): Have your code and deploy it too!
- [Hybrid RAG Search in LangChain Using Postgres and TypeScript](https://drmaas.me/articles/hybrid-search/): Combining vector and keyword search for robust information retrieval.
- [Iowa Road Trip](https://drmaas.me/articles/iowa-road-trip/): Discovering deeper history beyond the cornfields.
- [Performance Testing is Hard — But Worth It](https://drmaas.me/articles/perf-testing/): Why comprehensive load testing demands discipline and careful analysis.
- [On Partition Keys — Why Randomization Matters in Distributed Systems](https://drmaas.me/articles/sharding/): A cautionary tale about hidden assumptions in data distribution.

- [Media & Resources](https://drmaas.me/topics/media/): Curated media recommendations.
